description: Tasks template for modernization plan. Generate this file alongside plan.md to track individual migration tasks.

tasks.reason: Addresses issues: Java Version Has Reached the End of Support. Java 1.8 no longer receives OSS security updates and blocks compatibility with modern Spring and Azure runtimes.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade the project from Java 1.8 to a supported LTS Java version compatible with the target Spring Framework and Spring Boot versions. Update the java.version, maven.compiler.source, and maven.compiler.target properties in pom.xml and resolve any resulting compilation issues.

tasks.reason: Addresses issues: Spring Framework Version Has Reached the End of OSS Support. The current Spring Framework version is out of OSS support and incompatible with the upgraded Java runtime.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade Spring Framework to a supported major version compatible with the upgraded Java runtime, including the Jakarta EE (javax.* to jakarta.*) namespace migration that the Spring Framework upgrade entails. Resolve API and configuration changes introduced by the new major version.

tasks.reason: Addresses issues: Spring Boot Version Has Reached the End of OSS Support. Spring Boot 2.3.12.RELEASE is end-of-life and must be upgraded for security patches and Azure readiness.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade Spring Boot from 2.3.12.RELEASE to a supported major version compatible with the upgraded Java runtime and Spring Framework. Update the parent version and starter dependencies in pom.xml, migrate deprecated/renamed configuration properties, and resolve breaking changes.

tasks.description: Containerize Java Application for Container Readiness
tasks.reason: Addresses issues: No Dockerfile found. The application is not yet containerized, which blocks container-based replatforming to Azure Container Apps or AKS.
tasks.requirements: Create a Dockerfile for the upgraded Spring Boot application to enable container-based deployment to Azure services such as Azure Container Apps or Azure Kubernetes Service. Ensure the container image builds from the modernized runtime and framework and produces a runnable application container.
